creator: eu9gu4@gmail.com
text:
Up until this last version openzfs worked perfectly fine. 20200720 build fails with:

ld: error: unable to find library -ludev

libudev.so is provided by libudev-devd port in /usr/local/lib.

The build completes successfully when a symlink is created in /usr/lib, but I don't think it's the right thing to do. It seems that the port is not looking for the library in /usr/local/lib.
